properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Saviour of my soul I worship You as God alone Greater love has made a way to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I could not forget The moment I in faith confessed For my sin You died and rose again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I believe every word You say Father God with all my heart I sing

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Open my eyes I want to see Your glory Your glory Lord I open my heart I want to be closer closer to You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Here I am again I find my strength in drawing near You have heard the desperate cry in me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And as I wait on You my God I'll know the voice of truth In quietness I am in awe And as I worship You my Lord I understand the cross The sacrifice of God
